dates.summary: OpenAI made GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro available in the API, extending its flagship model line into developer workflows and quickly triggering downstream distribution through products like Cursor and Perplexity. DeepSeek also released its V4 preview models as open weights with a 1M-token context window, reinforcing pressure on frontier labs with a lower-cost long-context alternative. ByteDance Seed added new model artifacts with Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview and a Full-Duplex Speech LLM, signaling continued competition in multimodal and voice-native foundation models.
